hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const p=(j.tool_input&&(j.tool_input.file_path||j.tool_input.path))||'';if(/\.(cs|vue|ts|tsx|csproj)$/.test(p)){process.stdout.write('[AUTO-TRIGGER] Source file changed: '+p+'\nMANDATORY: After all edits are complete, run the full 5-agent quality loop: tester + ui-agent + db-agent + ef-agent (parallel) → improver → re-verify. Do NOT report the task complete until all agents have run.\n')}}catch(e){}})"
